backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the marketplace backend, defining types and logic for account listings, purchases, vouches, user profiles, and admin access control with HTTP outcalls and authorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (AccountListing without rareSkin fields) to new state by adding null defaults for rareSkinNames and rareSkinShowcaseLink.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Rare Skins filter, admin rare skins panel, Special Deals fix) to their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a build/audit reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app with the document title set to "Ascension's Market" and a root div for mounting the app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for marketplace, vouches, and admin pages, and renders the shared layout with profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Admin settings panel that displays the current admin's principal and provides a form to assign the admin role to another principal via the `useAssignCallerUserRole` mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/Credential: Admin component with two forms: one to upload encrypted credentials for a specific account ID, and another to set a global decryption key, both using respective mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ListingsMa: Admin CRUD interface for marketplace listings, supporting add, edit, delete, toggle special deal, and mark-sold actions via dialogs and a data table, including a tag input for rare skin names.
frontend/src/components/admin/PurchasesV: Read-only admin table that displays purchase records for the current user, showing status badges, payment method labels, and timestamps with a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/admin/VouchModer: Admin moderation table for user vouches/reviews, allowing admins to hide/unhide or permanently delete individual vouches with confirmation.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Blocking modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter a display name and saves it via the actor's `saveCallerUserProfile` method before proceeding to the marketplace.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders a simple site footer with the Ascension's Market logo, a tagline about secure transactions, and a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links (Marketplace, Reviews, Admin), and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/marketplace/List: Displays a single marketplace listing card showing rank, rare skins, price, and a purchase button that opens a PurchaseFlowModal; sold listings show an overlay.
frontend/src/components/marketplace/Rank: Filter bar with rank buttons sorted by tier order and a Rare Skins toggle button for filtering marketplace listings.
frontend/src/components/marketplace/Spec: Renders a highlighted section of available special-deal listings using ListingCard; hides itself when no deals are available.
frontend/src/components/purchase/Credent: Handles fetching and displaying encrypted account credentials after purchase, with copy support and a 5-view limit enforced by the backend.
frontend/src/components/purchase/Payment: Payment step UI that shows send instructions and address for ICP, BTC, or ETH, accepts a transaction hash or block index, and calls the appropriate verification mutation.
frontend/src/components/purchase/Purchas: A multi-step modal dialog for purchasing a game account listing, handling authentication checks, payment method selection, payment verification, credential delivery, and triggering a post-purchase vouch prompt.
frontend/src/components/vouch/AverageRat: Displays an aggregate star rating summary for a list of vouches, showing the average score and a per-star distribution bar chart.
frontend/src/components/vouch/StarRating: An interactive or read-only 5-star rating input component with hover effects and configurable size.
Renders a single vouch/review card displaying the anonymous username, rank badge, star rating, timestamp, and optional review text.
frontend/src/components/vouch/VouchPromp: A modal form that prompts the buyer to submit an anonymous review after a purchase, handling submission via the submitVouch mutation and displaying various backend result states via toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching the caller's user profile and admin status, plus a helper function to save the caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including listings CRUD, vouches, purchases, user profiles, and admin operations using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a dark tactical theme using Tailwind, custom OKLCH color tokens, utility classes, scrollbar styling, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions and constants including class merging, ICP/timestamp formatting, rank definitions, rank color/icon maps, and payment address constants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with authentication gating, admin claim flow, and tabbed management sections for listings, credentials, purchases, vouches, and settings.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Marketplace page displaying available account listings with rank/rare-skin filtering, a hero banner, stats bar, and special deals section.
frontend/src/pages/VouchesPage.tsx: Vouches page that displays verified buyer reviews with an average rating summary and a list of individual vouch cards, with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, crimson, surface, sidebar, chart), box shadows, border radii, and shimmer/accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the architecture, features, known issues, and build plan for 'Ascension's Market', a 4-canister ICP marketplace for Rainbow Six Siege accounts with React/TypeScript frontend.
